rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ANA E. GOMEZ REVOCABLE INTERVIVOS TRUST OF 1998 DATE 12/9/1998
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Myrta Salume'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Lawrence D. Murray
rulings.Rulings: The Motion to Dismiss is Denied. The Code of Civil Procedure does not provide for a motion to dismiss based on information provided in a declaration outside the pleadings. The motion amounts to a motion for summary judgment, but it does not conform to the procedural notice or formatting requirements for such a motion. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk at (415) 551-3702 by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, Feb. 15, 2012.
